title: arrhenatherum bulbosum
intro: Arrhenatherum bulbosum, also known as orchellet or meadow oat-grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum bulbosum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
